/usr/bin/c++  -fPIC -fno-semantic-interposition -fvisibility-inlines-hidden -Werror=date-time -Wall -Wextra -Wno-unused-parameter -Wwrite-strings -Wcast-qual -Wno-missing-field-initializers -Wimplicit-fallthrough -Wno-nonnull -Wno-class-memaccess -Wno-dangling-reference -Wno-redundant-move -Wno-pessimizing-move -Wno-array-bounds -Wno-stringop-overread -Wno-noexcept-type -Wdelete-non-virtual-dtor -Wsuggest-override -Wno-comment -Wno-misleading-indentation -Wctad-maybe-unsupported -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/lic.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lic.dir/check_cmd.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lic.dir/workspace_check.cpp.o -o lic  ../cache/libli_cache.a ../common/libli_common.a ../analyze/libli_analyze.a ../codegen/libli_codegen.a ../config/libli_config.a ../diagnostics/libli_diagnostics.a ../parser/libli_parser.a ../types/libli_types.a ../verify/libli_verify.a ../mir/libli_mir.a ../../runtime/libli_rt.a ../common/libli_common.a ../types/libli_types.a ../verify/libli_verify.a ../mir/libli_mir.a ../config/libli_config.a ../parser/libli_parser.a ../lexer/libli_lexer.a ../ast/libli_ast.a ../diagnostics/libli_diagnostics.a /usr/lib/llvm-22/lib/libLLVMCore.a /usr/lib/llvm-22/lib/libLLVMBinaryFormat.a /usr/lib/llvm-22/lib/libLLVMRemarks.a /usr/lib/llvm-22/lib/libLLVMBitstreamReader.a /usr/lib/llvm-22/lib/libLLVMTargetParser.a /usr/lib/llvm-22/lib/libLLVMSupport.a /usr/lib/llvm-22/lib/libLLVMDemangle.a -lrt -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz3.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libzstd.so -ldl
